MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mike Garza, is present.
Attorney, Alo Smith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Angela McCoy, Aaron Richmond, John Sykes, Lynn Foxx, Elizabeth Drury, Chester Baggs, Renita Sykes, is present.
Attorney, Maricel Montano , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-24-2010 remains on calendar.
